description_long: This is a structured rectangular handbag with a hard shell exterior, predominantly white with bold black diagonal stripes across its main surfaces. A distinctive yellow strap with black 'OFF-WHITE' branding runs diagonally across the front, adding a striking visual and designer appeal. The bag features a long, white shoulder strap attached with gold-tone hardware, suitable for crossbody or shoulder wear. The closure appears to be a front flap with a metallic clasp, providing both security and style. The overall design is modern and urban, with a high-contrast color scheme and a fashion-forward aesthetic. The handbag is compact, likely intended for carrying personal essentials in city environments.
description: A rectangular, white handbag with black diagonal stripes, a yellow 'OFF-WHITE' branded strap, and a long white shoulder strap with gold hardware. The design is bold, modern, and highly distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black diagonal stripes, yellow 'OFF-WHITE' strap, and gold clasp on the flap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile, strap attachment, and a glimpse of the yellow branded strap.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with black diagonal stripes and the yellow strap partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the slimness and the way the strap attaches to the bag.
attribute_brand_logo: The yellow strap features the 'OFF-WHITE' brand name in bold black letters, running diagonally across the front of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: One long, adjustable white shoulder or crossbody strap attached with gold-tone hardware; one decorative yellow branded strap across the front.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap with a metallic clasp located at the center bottom of the flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Yellow 'OFF-WHITE' branded strap, gold-tone hardware, and bold black diagonal stripes.
attribute_pattern: Black diagonal stripes on a white background.
